testTitle: HP Police Constable Full Mock Test 2
customInstructions: This mock test strictly follows the latest HP Police Constable Exam Pattern.
Total Questions: 90, Total Marks: 90, Total Time: 120 Minutes.
Every incorrect answer will deduct 0.25 Marks (Negative Marking).
Questions are available in both English and Hindi.

questions.questionEn: Choose the correct synonym of 'Abundant':
Choose the correct antonym of 'Transparent':
One word substitution: A piece of land surrounded by water on all sides.
Spot the error in the sentence: "One of the boy has done his work."
Fill in the blank with the correct preposition: She has been suffering from fever ____ Monday.
Change the voice: "The police caught the thief."
options: The thief was caught by the police.
The thief is caught by the police.
The thief has been caught by the police.
The thief had been caught by the police.

questions.questionEn: Change into Indirect Speech: She said to me, "Are you coming?"
options: She asked me if I am coming.
She asked me if I was coming.
She told me that I was coming.
She said to me that are you coming.

questions.questionEn: Fill in the blank with the correct tense: Look! The bus _____.
What does the idiom "A white elephant" mean?

Rearrange the following jumbled parts to make a meaningful sentence:
P: in the east
Q: the sun
R: rises
S: every morning
Choose the correct clause to complete the sentence: "If you work hard, _______."
Identify the part of speech of the underlined word: He ran <u>quickly</u> to catch the train.
Choose the correct article: He gave me ____ useful piece of advice.
Find the correctly spelt word:
Choose the correct synonym of 'Huge':
Identify the error: "He did not went to the market."
Change the voice: "She sings a song."
options: A song is sung by her.
A song was sung by her.
A song is singing by her.

questions.questionEn: Plural of 'Mouse':
One word substitution: A person who does not believe in God.
Choose the correct tense: They _________ (play) football now.

questions.questionHi: 'महोत्सव' शब्द का सही संधि-विच्छेद क्या है?
'चतुर्भुज' में कौन सा समास है?
मुहावरा 'गले का हार होना' का क्या अर्थ है?
'कमल' का पर्यायवाची शब्द है:
'सज्जन' का विलोम शब्द क्या है?
'जिसका कोई शत्रु न हो' के लिए एक शब्द है:
शुद्ध वर्तनी का चयन करें:
'राम ने रावण को बाण से मारा' - इस वाक्य में 'बाण से' में कौन सा कारक है?
निम्नलिखित में से अशुद्ध वाक्य चुनें:
अंग्रेजी शब्द 'Translation' का सही हिंदी अनुवाद क्या है?
'घोड़ा' का तत्सम शब्द क्या है?
'नमक-मिर्च लगाना' मुहावरे का अर्थ है:
'प' वर्ग का उच्चारण स्थान क्या है?
'अनुराग' का विलोम शब्द है:
'यथासंभव' में कौन सा समास है?
'हाथ मलना' मुहावरे का अर्थ है:
'आँख' का पर्यायवाची शब्द नहीं है:
'शेर' का स्त्रीलिंग रूप क्या है?
हिंदी वर्णमाला में स्वरों की संख्या है:
'च-वर्ग' का उच्चारण स्थान क्या है?

questions.questionEn: A man is facing North. He turns 90 degrees clockwise, then 180 degrees counter-clockwise. Which direction is he facing now?
